title: Dark Flows
summary:
Main
Despite operating under long running sanctions, Iranian crude exports continue to flow. The large shadow tanker fleet as well as the network of traders and financial intermediaries that make this trade possible have occasionally faced sanctions enforcement. US Treasury officials have recently been in Malaysia and Singapore to have discussions with local players about the ongoing presence of large-scale Ship-to-Ship (STS) operations of sanctioned Iranian, Venezuelan crudes off the Malaysian coast.
